name: codex-ai-ppt
description: Prepare confirmed PPT generation artifacts, then hand off to /goal for GPT Images rendering and PPTX export.

interface.shortDescription: 分阶段确认中间产物后，用 /goal 和 GPT Images 生成图片式 PPT
interface.longDescription: Codex AI PPT provides three initialization flows for spark ideas, structured outlines, and complete page briefs. It gates visual style source selection, persists reviewable artifacts, and emits a ready-to-paste /goal handoff that renders full-slide images and exports a PPTX.
defaultPrompt: /codex-ai-ppt:spark 做一个关于 AI 历史的 PPT
/codex-ai-ppt:outline 根据这份大纲生成图片式 PPT
/codex-ai-ppt:brief 把这些页面描述直接生成 PPT
